Your password separates different user a: Vocêr password separates different user accounts on the same device e browser, e encrypts sensitive information like GitHub tokens e API keys if provided. The password itself is securely hashed e never stored in plain text. However, your project files e documents remain unencrypted in browser storage - anyone with physical access to this browser can view them. When using public or compartilhado computers, export your account as a ZIP file e clear TeXlyre's browser data before leaving.

Your session expires when you close the: Vocêr session expires when you close the browser or after 24 hours
